name: Kimi K2-Instruct-0905
tagline: Updated K2-Instruct: improved coding performance and context window raised from 128K to 256K tokens.
seoTitle: Kimi K2-Instruct-0905 — Moonshot AI (Kimi) LLM specs
metaDescription: Kimi K2-Instruct-0905 (Moonshot AI (Kimi)), released 2025-09-09 — part of the Kimi K2 line. Updated K2-Instruct: improved coding performance and context window…
overview: Kimi K2-Instruct-0905 is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi K2 line. Released 2025-09-09. Moonshot's flagship open-weight 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model line (32B active) for agentic chat and coding.
What's notable in this version: Updated K2-Instruct: improved coding performance and context window raised from 128K to 256K tokens.
